commands.review_summary:
The PR adds inline rename controls to chat session picker rows, wires picker rename state through the Control UI app state, and adds focused unit tests for picker rename behavior.

PR surface: Source +314, Tests +186. Total +500 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR implements a requested UI capability rather than a broken existing behavior. Source inspection and the linked issue review confirm current main has session labels and a picker, but no picker/sidebar rename affordance.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real browser proof before merge, and automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's environment.

target.title: fix(ui): rename chat sessions from the picker
target.body:
## Summary
- add inline session-title rename controls to the chat session picker/sidebar using the existing `sessions.patch` label contract
- preserve picker state around rename by blocking conflicting actions during save, keeping close behavior predictable, and refreshing the picker/session lists without dropping loaded pages
- add focused chat picker tests for rename open/save/no-op/in-flight cases

Closes #89922.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: Chat/sidebar session picker can now rename session titles inline instead of forcing users into the Sessions table.
- Real environment tested: Local Control UI unit test environment in this checkout.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- Evidence after fix: Added picker rename interaction coverage in `ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`, including save, no-op, and in-flight save behavior.
- Observed result after fix: Session picker rows enter inline edit mode, submit `sessions.patch`, keep save/error state coherent, and preserve loaded picker pages after rename.
- What was not tested: Manual browser click-through on a live Control UI instance.
target.author: huangting-xy
